prose:
Fukui reactivity (f⁺, f⁻, dual descriptor) calculated for pyridine using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier standard, PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed structure (11 atoms). The most electrophilic site is the nitrogen atom with f⁺ = 0.4842; the most nucleophilic site is carbon (atom 4, ortho position) with f⁻ = 0.1183. All three SCF states (neutral, cation, anion) converged; charge conservation checks (Σf⁺ = 1.0000, Σf⁻ = 1.0000) passed. No warnings reported. The headline value reported is the highest f⁺ (nitrogen, most electrophilic).</prose>
<parameter name="n_atoms">11
